# Leaflet 1.9.4

- Upstream: https://leafletjs.com/download.html
- Release: https://github.com/Leaflet/Leaflet/releases/tag/v1.9.4
- Downloaded archive SHA-256: `aaec1d5c3239a613a53e996087629aca1483cb2f0438b11b8a335c6cede4c16b`
- `dist/leaflet.css` SHA-256 after LF line-ending normalization: `337bfca5cabd03b39815b2700febe2b3b7edf55921c59cd49f88ecb328212303`
- `dist/leaflet.js` SHA-256: `85d455b4522415f6badc42a0e7d17c919d100347d6b8958bd0dc738fdecd6d50`
- License: BSD-2-Clause, see `LICENSE`

The release is stored locally so the GIS remains usable when external CDN access is unavailable. The `images` directory stays beside `leaflet.css`, as required by Leaflet.
